news.title:

news.title:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.

The funds support capacity expansion for zinc, EVs, renewables, and rare earth exploration.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc approved allotment of 42,000 NCDs worth ₹420 Cr and 98,000 NCDs worth ₹980 Cr.
Total cumulative principal is capped at ₹1,400 Cr, with resolution passed on Feb 2, 2026.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc approved allotment of 42,000 NCDs worth ₹420 Cr and 98,000 NCDs worth ₹980 Cr.
Total cumulative principal is capped at ₹1,400 Cr, with resolution passed on Feb 2, 2026.

news.title:
GMDC shares rose 3% and NMDC recovered 0.4% after FM announced rare-earth corridors in Budget 2026.
Nalco and Hindustan Zinc shares fell 7.9% and 8.6% respectively, amid a broader metals sell-off.
news.summary:
GMDC shares rose 3% and NMDC recovered 0.4% after FM announced rare-earth corridors in Budget 2026.
Nalco and Hindustan Zinc shares fell 7.9% and 8.6% respectively, amid a broader metals sell-off.

news.title:

The transaction value totaled Rs. 20.9 crores on the NSE.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc shares dropped 12.5% on Friday, erasing ₹36,000 crore in market cap after a record global silver price fall.
Vedanta's recent 1.6% OFS worth ₹4,500 crore saw Hindustan Zinc's stock dip below its indicative price and floor price.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc shares dropped 12.5% on Friday, erasing ₹36,000 crore in market cap after a record global silver price fall.
Vedanta's recent 1.6% OFS worth ₹4,500 crore saw Hindustan Zinc's stock dip below its indicative price and floor price.
